{{Short description|Italian film festival in 2003}} {{Use dmy dates|date=April 2020}} {{Infobox Film festival |name = 60th Venice International Film Festival |image = VeniceFilmFestival60poster.jpg |caption = Festival Poster |opening =''[[Anything Else]]'' |closing = |location = [[Venice]], [[Italy]] |founded = 1932 |awards =[[Golden Lion]]:
''[[The Return (2003 film)|The Return]]'' |artistic_director= [[ Moritz de Hadeln]] |host = [[Alessandra Martines]] |number = |date = 27 August – 6 September 2003 |website = [http://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/ Website] | chronology = Venice Film Festival | preceded_by = [[59th Venice International Film Festival|59th]] | followed_by = [[61st Venice International Film Festival|61st]] }} The '''60th annual [[Venice Film Festival|Venice International Film Festival]]''' was held from 27 August to 6 September 2003, at [[Venice Lido]] in [[Italy]].{{cite web |url=http://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/news/jul2003/1-07.html |title=The 60th Mostra pays homage to Katharine Hepburn |work=labiennale.org |url-status=dead |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20031004203233/http://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/news/jul2003/1-07.html |archive-date=4 October 2003 |access-date=8 June 2018 }}{{cite web|url=http://www.americancinemapapers.com/files/VENICE_2003.htm|title=VENICE – 2003 GOLDEN LIONS AND OTHER HOT STUFF|access-date=6 October 2013}}{{cite web|url=http://www.carnivalofvenice.com/?page_id=503&lang=en|title=The 2000s|date=19 April 2010 |access-date=8 October 2013}} Italian filmmaker [[Mario Monicelli]] was the Jury President of the main competition. The [[Golden Lion]] was awarded to ''[[The Return (2003 film)|The Return]]'' by [[Andrey Zvyagintsev]]. The festival opened with ''[[Anything Else]]'' by [[Woody Allen]].{{cite web |url=http://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/news/jul2003/18-07.html |title=Woody Allen to open 60th Mostra |work=labiennale.org |url-status=dead |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20030820070213/http://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/news/jul2003/18-07.html |archive-date=20 August 2003 |access-date=8 June 2018 }} ==Juries== === Main Competition (''Venezia 60'') === * [[Mario Monicelli]], Italian filmmaker - Jury President{{cite web |title=60th Mostra - Sections, Juries and Awards |url=http://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/60thmostra/sections/ |url-status=dead |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20030828232059/http://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/60thmostra/sections/ |archive-date=28 August 2003 |access-date=8 June 2018 |work=labiennale.org}}{{cite web |title=Juries for the 2000s |url=http://www.carnivalofvenice.com/?page_id=527&lang=en |url-status=dead |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170804133752/http://www.carnivalofvenice.com/?page_id=527&lang=en |archive-date=4 August 2017 |access-date=4 April 2018}} * [[Stefano Accorsi]], Italian actor * [[Michael Ballhaus]], German cinematographer * [[Ann Hui]], Chinese director * [[Pierre Jolivet]], French director, actor, screenwriter, and producer * [[Monty Montgomery (producer)|Monty Montgomery]], American actor and filmmaker * [[Assumpta Serna]], Spanish actress === Upstream (''Controcorrente'') === The following people were selected to confer the San Marco Prize for best film, the Special Director's Award, an Upstream Prize for Best Actor, and one for Best Actress:{{cite web |title=Official Awards of the 60th Mostra |url=http://www.labiennale.org/2003/en/cinema/news/sep2003/6-09u.html |url-status=dead |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20040804020433/http://www.labiennale.org/2003/en/cinema/news/sep2003/6-09u.html |archive-date=4 August 2004 |access-date=8 June 2018 |work=labiennale.org}} * [[Laure Adler]], French Journalist - Jury President * Vito Amoruso, Italian literary critic * [[Samir Farid]], Egyptian film critic * [[Rene Liu]], Taiwanese singer-songwriter, actress, director and writer * [[Ulrich Tukur]], German actor === ''Luigi De Laurentiis'' Award for a Debut Feature === * [[Lia van Leer]], Israeli founder of the [[Haifa Cinematheque]], [[the Jerusalem Cinematheque's Israel Film Archive]], and the [[Jerusalem Film Festival]] -
